title: Bionano Symposium spotlights scalable OGM to 10,000 samples
text: Bionano Genomics' 2026 Symposium concluded with presentations emphasizing scalability of optical genome mapping technology to handle 10,000+ samples annually. The event showcased advances in Stratys system throughput and Stratys Compute capabilities. Key highlights: Stratys Compute can process 10,000 cancer samples per year (vs ~240 for competing long-read sequencing platforms), new software enhancements (VIA 7.2, Solve 3.8.3) improve analysis speed and accuracy, AI-powered workflows accelerate interpretation for genetic disorders, clinical collaborators demonstrated successful integration into high-volume labs. The symposium reinforced Bionano's technological leadership in scalable genome analysis. Discussion of reimbursement pathway expansion and market opportunity for constitutional genetic disorder testing. Presentations highlighted growing publication base (28+ in Q1 2026) supporting clinical utility. The event provided positive reinforcement of market positioning and growth potential.
